category_sources: source_facts.description says implementation of the Smalltalk language; GNU Smalltalk homepage says it is a free implementation of Smalltalk-80.
display_name_sources: GNU Smalltalk homepage, manual, and Savannah summary use GNU Smalltalk; source_facts.name is gnu-smalltalk.
docs_sources: GNU Smalltalk homepage lists the official user manual and class library references under gnu.org/software/smalltalk/manual.
repo_sources: Savannah Git Repositories page for smalltalk gives anonymous clone URL https://git.savannah.gnu.org/git/smalltalk.git for the GNU Smalltalk interpreter and libraries.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify Smalltalk tooling; GNU Smalltalk Savannah summary describes an ANSI Smalltalk implementation with VM and class libraries.
